title: Deploy user can't write to the shared app directory
description_md:
Deployments run as the `deploy` user and write into `/srv/app`, which is group-owned by `appteam` and group-writable. A new hire set up the `deploy` account but it still can't write there, failing every release with `Permission denied`. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), work out what group membership is missing, and fix it.

You're done when the `deploy` user can create files in `/srv/app`.
